entity.summary: Solana decentralized trading protocol combining a spot market, AMM liquidity pools, leveraged spot positions, and an integrated lending layer.
entity.notes: HEI models DefiTuna and its AMM discovery row as one entity. Official documentation describes spot trading, maker and taker orders, leveraged spot positions, liquidity pools, and a Solana AMM/DEX experience.

evidence.title: Introducing DefiTuna
evidence.notes: First-party documentation explains DefiTuna's Spot Market, liquidity pools, lending layer, and stated goal of delivering a Solana AMM and DEX experience.

evidence.title: DefiTuna Trade documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party trade documentation exposes active trading, onboarding, AMM mechanics, and platform information sections.

evidence.title: DefiTuna DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry identifies DefiTuna AMM on Solana; HEI consolidates the AMM source row with the DefiTuna entity.
